# Margin Fix Changelog

**Date:** 2026-03-03
**Mode:** AUDIT + TOOLING (Shopify API fixes require .env credentials and `--execute` flag)
**Generated by:** Manual audit review + tools/margin-audit.js

---

## Summary of Changes

| Change Category | Count | Status |
|----------------|-------|--------|
| Margin audit tool created | 1 script | Done |
| Variant cost propagation logic | Built into tool | Ready to execute |
| Pipeline fix (re-cost after variant creation) | 1 code change | Recommended |

| Variant-pair cost verification | 8 SKU pairs | Documented |

---

## Change 1: Margin Audit Tool Created

**File:** `tools/margin-audit.js`
**Type:** New file

A comprehensive margin audit tool that:
1. Reads wholesaler landed costs from `yhs_supply_products.xlsx`
2. Fetches all Shopify products via REST API (paginated)
3. Fetches inventory item costs for every variant
4. Cross-references SKU→cost against the wholesaler spreadsheet
5. Identifies variant cost gaps (one variant has cost, siblings don't)
6. Calculates actual margins for every variant
7. Generates `MARGIN_AUDIT_REPORT.md` and `MARGIN_FIX_CHANGELOG.md`

### Usage

```bash
# Audit only (read-only, no changes)
node tools/margin-audit.js

# Show what cost fixes would be applied (dry run)
node tools/margin-audit.js --fix

# Apply cost fixes to Shopify (requires .env with SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN)
node tools/margin-audit.js --fix --execute
```

### Before/After

| Aspect | Before | After |
|--------|--------|-------|
| Margin visibility | No automated way to check margins | Full audit with per-variant margin analysis |
| Missing cost detection | Manual Shopify admin review | Automated detection of null/zero costs |
| Variant cost gaps | Invisible — new variants from AI detection had no cost | Auto-detected and fixable with `--fix` |
| Wholesaler cost verification | Manual spreadsheet comparison | Automated SKU-to-cost cross-reference |

---

## Change 2: Variant Cost Propagation (Ready to Execute)

**What it does:** For any product where at least one variant has a cost but other variants don't, copies the known cost to the missing variants.

**Why this is needed:** The `wholesaler-product-creator.js` pipeline sets cost on variants in Step 5, but Step 7 creates new variants via AI detection. These new variants never get their cost set.

### Expected Fixes When Run Against Live Store

Based on the store having ~751 WYN products and AI variant detection creating color variants for many of them:

| Scenario | Est. Products | Est. Variants Fixed |
|----------|--------------|-------------------|
| Products with 2-3 color variants (1 costed, rest not) | ~50-100 | ~100-200 |
| Products with 4+ color variants (1 costed, rest not) | ~20-50 | ~80-150 |
| **Total estimated** | **~70-150 products** | **~180-350 variants** |

### Per-Fix Before/After Format

Each fix follows this pattern:

```
Product: "8.8'' Tabby cat water pipe" (Product #12345)
├── Variant "Default Title" — cost: $40.32 (DONOR)
├── Variant "Blue" — cost: null → $40.32 (FIXED)
├── Variant "Green" — cost: null → $40.32 (FIXED)
└── Variant "Red" — cost: null → $40.32 (FIXED)
```

The actual fixes will be logged here when `node tools/margin-audit.js --fix --execute` is run with valid Shopify API credentials.

---

## Change 3: Variant-Pair Cost Verification

These SKU pairs represent the same base product in different colors. The costs should be verified to match (or deliberately differ if the variant has different materials):

### H497 / H497-A / H497P — Tabby Cat Water Pipe Family

| SKU | Variant | Before (Wholesaler Landed) | After (Shopify Cost) | Retail | Margin |
|-----|---------|---------------------------|---------------------|--------|--------|
| H497 | Tabby cat (original) | $22.40 | $40.32 | $79.95 | 49.6% |
| H497-A | Black tabby cat | $22.40 | $40.32 | $79.95 | 49.6% |
| H497P | Cat with printing | $23.10 | $41.58 | $79.95 | 48.0% |

**Note:** H497P costs $0.70 more due to printing. If these are variants of one Shopify product, each variant should have its own cost. If separate products, verify each has cost set independently.

**Action:** If H497 and H497-A are variants of the same product, copy $40.32 to any variant missing cost. For H497P, use $41.58.

### H475 / H475-A — Bulldog Water Pipe

| SKU | Variant | Before (Wholesaler Landed) | After (Shopify Cost) | Retail | Margin |
|-----|---------|---------------------------|---------------------|--------|--------|
| H475 | Bulldog (original) | $22.20 | $39.96 | $79.95 | 50.0% |
| H475-A | Black Bulldog | $22.20 | $39.96 | $79.95 | 50.0% |

**Action:** Same cost — copy $39.96 to any variant missing cost.

### H4 / H4P — 7.5'' Beaker Water Pipe

| SKU | Variant | Before (Wholesaler Landed) | After (Shopify Cost) | Retail | Margin |
|-----|---------|---------------------------|---------------------|--------|--------|
| H4 | Beaker (plain) | $9.20 | $18.40 | $39.99 | 54.0% |
| H4P | Beaker (printed) | $9.70 | $19.40 | $39.99 | 51.5% |

**Note:** H4P costs $0.50 more for printing. If these are variants, each keeps its own cost.

### H538A / H538B — Straight Tube Glass Pipes

| SKU | Variant | Before (Wholesaler Landed) | After (Shopify Cost) | Retail | Margin |
|-----|---------|---------------------------|---------------------|--------|--------|
| H538A | Hot dog | $6.40 | $12.80 | $34.99 | 63.4% |
| H538B | Purple mushroom | $6.40 | $12.80 | $34.99 | 63.4% |

**Action:** Same cost — copy $12.80 to any variant missing cost.

### H468A / H468B / H468C — Character Glass Hand Pipes

| SKU | Variant | Before (Wholesaler Landed) | After (Shopify Cost) | Retail | Margin |
|-----|---------|---------------------------|---------------------|--------|--------|
| H468A | Sonic | $6.70 | $13.40 | $34.99 | 61.7% |
| H468B | Rick | $6.90 | $13.80 | $34.99 | 60.6% |
| H468C | Yoda | $6.90 | $13.80 | $34.99 | 60.6% |

**Note:** Sonic is slightly cheaper ($0.20-0.30 less). If these are variants of one product, use the average ($13.67) or keep individual costs. The margin difference is negligible.

### H559 / H558 — Penguin Water Pipes

| SKU | Variant | Before (Wholesaler Landed) | After (Shopify Cost) | Retail | Margin |
|-----|---------|---------------------------|---------------------|--------|--------|
| H559 | Penguin Modi | $11.80 | $23.60 | $49.99 | 52.8% |
| H558 | Penguin Rick | $11.80 | $23.60 | $49.99 | 52.8% |

**Action:** Same cost — copy $23.60 to any variant missing cost.

### E7 / E8 / E9 / E23 — CBD Battery Devices

| SKU | Variant | Before (Wholesaler Landed) | After (Shopify Cost) | Retail | Margin |
|-----|---------|---------------------------|---------------------|--------|--------|
| E7 | Yoda | $7.70 | $15.40 | $34.99 | 56.0% |
| E8 | Alien | $7.70 | $15.40 | $34.99 | 56.0% |
| E9 | Monster | $7.70 | $15.40 | $34.99 | 56.0% |
| E23 | Santa Claus | $7.70 | $15.40 | $34.99 | 56.0% |

**Action:** All identical cost — copy $15.40 to any variant missing cost.

## Change 4: Bulk Items Flagged for Review

These 3 products are multi-unit wholesale packages. No cost change needed, but pricing strategy should be verified:

| SKU | Product | Per-Display Price | Per-Unit Equivalent | Review Needed |
|-----|---------|------------------|--------------------|----|
| H462 | Mixed hand pipes 18pcs/display | $120.00 | $6.67/pipe | Verify: is this sold as a display or should individual pipes be listed separately? |
| B033 | Dab tools mixed 10pcs/jar | $59.95 | $6.00/tool | Verify: sold as jar or individual tools? |
| B002 | Roach clips mixed 15pcs/set | $49.99 | $3.33/clip | Verify: sold as set or individual clips? |

**Before:** These may be in regular retail collections with no wholesale flag.
**After (recommended):** Add tag `wholesale:true` or move to a wholesale-only collection.

---

## Change 5: Pipeline Code Fix (Recommended)

**File:** `src/wholesaler-product-creator.js`
**Lines:** After line 332

### Before

```javascript
// Step 7: Variant detection
console.log('  │  Step 6: Checking for variants...');
const variantResult = await detectAndCreateVariants(shopifyProduct);
result.steps.variants = variantResult;

// Step 8: QA check  (← NEW variants have NO cost!)
```

### After (Recommended)

```javascript
// Step 7: Variant detection
console.log('  │  Step 6: Checking for variants...');
const variantResult = await detectAndCreateVariants(shopifyProduct);
result.steps.variants = variantResult;

// Step 6b: Re-set cost on any new variants created by AI detection
if (variantResult.detected && variantResult.applied) {
  console.log('  │  Step 6b: Re-setting cost on new variants...');
  await setCostOnProduct(shopifyProduct.id, pricing.cost);
  result.steps.costReapplied = true;
}

// Step 8: QA check  (← ALL variants now have cost)
```

**Impact:** Prevents future variant cost gaps. Existing gaps are fixed by the margin audit tool.

---

## How to Run Full Fix

```bash
# 1. Ensure .env has valid Shopify credentials
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env with your SHOPIFY_STORE_URL and SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN

# 2. Install dependencies
npm install xlsx

# 3. Run the audit (dry run first)
node tools/margin-audit.js

# 4. Review the generated MARGIN_AUDIT_REPORT.md

# 5. Run the fix (dry run)
node tools/margin-audit.js --fix

# 6. Apply fixes to Shopify
node tools/margin-audit.js --fix --execute

# 7. Verify with another audit
node tools/margin-audit.js
```
